**NH RED Summit**
**Derek,**

I am proud to announce Governor John H. Sununu will deliver opening remarks at our upcoming RED Summit on Saturday, September 30 at the New Hampshire Institute of Politics.

Governor John H. Sununu served as Governor from 1983 to 1989 and served as President George Bush's first Chief of Staff.
Learn more about this event and register today at [REDSummit.GOP](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=8W-2B0ovlN66MrpBErbIEL-2BdyydhTe2s9t0L44on3NwA0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MxGTAVxiDxMWuwBfkT-2BmQEg9jAIQiq3J7Vv1pUvshziOIaeFDjcjSNTs1ZlsT1lp8ZV4Lo8LFtOAovIsIsj9WWNg3PbF9ulMBzHh8gWbBbrC6ZxNowgrVXmSrh6IghmNmoA3-2BzWChR3IVS6YesIQdC4SS-2FQzsGKLdemf9vBRd6bhZASCe-2FsjtTz3mty0qozpFJwNXL2x4ju7Eyfl-2FywiJ8KgcaRpBS3RvJ4DX811PNvksa3iC0N6tt-2Bx7pGvu8bjPzhqkSlNpF6c8hAnNIPL5Wg-3D-3D)

name: Matt Rosendale
subject: I mean business
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MATT ROSENDALE FOR MONTANA |
body:
Montanans deserve a leader who will stand up for them, NOT the liberal special interests in Washington! Join me in this fight.
| | |
---|---|---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

Are you sick and tired of Washington elites imposing their Big Government agenda on Montana?

Are you fed up with dishonest Democrat politicians who claim to support our Montana values... but then side with the special interests and far-left liberals from places like California and New York?

I know you are, Friend - because I know you agree we deserve better. **I 'm fed up too, and that's why I'm running for U.S. Senate against Jon Tester**.

We MUST defend our Montana way of life, get the federal government out of the way, and stand with President Trump to return power to the hardworking people who make this country great!

That's what I'm fighting for, and I mean business. It's time to DEFEAT Jon Tester, and I know we can do it... but we need every conservative to get involved.

[**If you agree that Montana needs bold conservative leadership in Washington, please JOIN my campaign at this critical time with a $5, $10, $25, $50 or $100 contribution - or more if you can!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r) |
| |
---|---|---
| **[YES! I STAND WITH MATT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r)** |
---|---|---
| |
---|---|---
| Jon Tester represents all that's wrong with Washington. He's the ultimate D.C. insider - palling around and vacationing with people like New York ultra-liberal Chuck Schumer, and heading the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee in the last election cycle.

**Tester supported Hillary Clinton for president, and the candidates he's worked to elect supported amnesty for illegal aliens, abortion on demand, new restrictions on your gun rights ... and the list goes on and on!**

Tester's shown his true colors. Earlier this year he stood AGAINST our conservative values by opposing Justice Gorsuch's nomination to the Supreme Court.

And he recently suggested that Congress should "take a solid look" at a single-payer health care system - a complete federal takeover of our families' health care that would cost $32 TRILLION over ten years. It would mean MASSIVE tax hikes on hardworking Montanans!

The bottom line is Jon Tester DOES NOT represent our Montana values. [**We must defeat him in 2018**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r).

I am running for this seat because I believe in Montana, our traditions, and our way of life. I stand behind President Trump and Vice President Pence 100% as they work to drain the swamp in Washington and Make America Great Again, and I am eager to fight alongside them.

Jon Tester, on the other hand, has clearly sided with the liberal-left to obstruct President Trump's agenda at every turn.

It's time for new leadership, and I believe as your State Auditor and a former leader in the Legislature I have the experience and conservative support to defeat Jon Tester.

[**But your help is CRUCIAL at this early stage. Make your most generous possible donation to help me win, go to Washington, and stand with President Trump against the special interests!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r) |
| |
| **[YES! I STAND WITH MATT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r)** |
---|---|---
| |
---|---|---
| My wife Jean and I have been incredibly blessed, raising our three sons on our ranch near Glendive and finding success in business. We've lived the Montana dream... and I see it as my duty to restore and protect that dream for future generations. I know you agree we can't afford to let it slip away.

I've earned a reputation as a tireless fighter - for freedom, for opportunity, for life and for our individual rights, including our Second Amendment rights - and I am ready to hit the ground running in Washington to fight for the great people of Montana.

[**Please stand with me as I take on Jon Tester and his powerful allies**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r). Your involvement is crucial to our success, and I greatly appreciate any level of support you're able to help with.

Thank you,

Matt Rosendale

P.S. I'm running for U.S. Senate to defend our Montana way of life, _and I know we can defeat Jon Tester with your help!_ [**Tap or click on this link to join my campaign team today with a $5, $10, $25, $50 or $100 contribution, or more if you can**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/44162505:WV9SeMEJN:m:1:1857329133:0C3C81AD2A2FED7E5C18B052FB5C230E:r). |

subject: URGENT: Tester supports radical federal takeover

body:
Jon Tester’s far-left true colors are showing. Help me stand up for our Montana values and DEFEAT him in 2018!
---
| | | | [](http://click.email-mattformontana.com/?qs=37b50efd66d991484cb02a40a656be52393eae6dcf0a7be4973b884316354756b3385d74e08dfa8ccc350626c89b2c55f784acbf6ef20edb)

| | | Friend, Did you hear about the latest comments from Jon Tester?

Last Wednesday during a Capitol Hill hearing, Tester shared his belief that Congress should take a "solid look" at single-payer health care.

**He 's talking about a FEDERAL GOVERNMENT TAKEOVER of the health care of every Montanan and every American! **

You can **_[tap or click here to watch the video](http://click.email-mattformontana.com/?qs=37b50efd66d9914883ac453701e72d0ffdd49b806dab9a566d5c95501cbf7837ae019e43da699438df2ba99de2e74f51a0dfa84056aa337f)_** of his comments.

Frankly, I'm APPALLED that Jon Tester would join leftists like Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren to support such a radical plan. As Montana's insurance commissioner, I know just how devastating single-payer would be to our economy and our families' health care.

Jon Tester has clearly become a full-blown Big Government insider, and is 100% out-of-touch with Montana voters!

**_[I know you agree it's time for Tester to go - please support my campaign again at this critical time with a $20, $35, $50, $100 or $250 special contribution, or more if you can.](http://click.email-mattformontana.com/?qs=37b50efd66d9914883ac453701e72d0ffdd49b806dab9a566d5c95501cbf7837ae019e43da699438df2ba99de2e74f51a0dfa84056aa337f)_**

name: The White House
subject: Continued Support for Hurricane Relief
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab33c5953dfe6561d27f9184430060e36f20b8d536fe7c45fb1c4a1e69c9e505837d572010cd3b101c8be11406e65e2bb592

-------------

Hurricane Irma and 9/11 Counterterrorism Briefing

Yesterday, President Trump received a Hurricane Irma and 9/11 counterterrorism briefing from his Homeland Security and Counter Terrorism Adviser Thomas Bossert and members of his National Security Council team.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab33b4b726ba36158d60b628e3a793c7277d68b74bbcf713071efe4024c19b2e6cab545dd58d3dd7545e59520f18c27264e4
View photos

President Trump Approves Alabama Emergency Declaration

President Trump declared that an emergency exists in the State of Alabama and ordered Federal assistance to supplement State, tribal, and local response efforts due to the emergency conditions resulting from Hurricane Irma beginning on September 8, 2017, and continuing.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab33f779dff441f000213344432d4c5ae6a9434eb97219b81511744c31df61d706e86e962fb7616028a9fbe276ae601d020f
Read more

FEMA Resources

Residents and business owners who sustained losses in designated counties can begin applying for assistance by registering online at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab33bb25ae0a9d5157d2a7c68903e0b7e71835dec1f6353267e3e86e69976d1cca2579efd7595f55f35eca2f604460cb71fb
DisasterAssistance.gov or by calling 1-800-621-FEMA (3362) or 1-800-462-7585 (TTY) for the hearing and speech impaired. The toll-free telephone numbers will operate from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. (local time) seven days a week until further notice.

Spirit of Unity

Tonight, President Trump will host a bipartisan Senators dinner at the White House to discuss tax reform. Continuing in that spirit of unity, the President will meet this week with Sen. Tim Scott to discuss racial reconciliation, and with a bipartisan group of legislators to discuss how to “change the tone” of divisiveness in Washington.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participate in a Sept. 11 observance at the Pentagon | September 11, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will meet with Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross and Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency Scott Pruitt. The President will then receive his daily intelligence briefing and meet with National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster. In the afternoon, the President will welcome Prime Minister Najib Abdul Razak of Malaysia and lead an expanded meeting with him. The President will then meet with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson. This evening, the President will host a bipartisan Senators dinner.

Vice President Pence will join President Trump to participate in an expanded bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Najib Abdul Razak of Malaysia. Following, the Vice President will travel to the U.S. Capitol to participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch. The Vice President will then participate in a meeting with U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer. In the evening, the Vice President will join the President for a bipartisan Senators dinner.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab3380cc47e93bd83e5b4e4a0a1bf2a068d8beaf5e789de595e4e46587a5afecac44daadb8fdbbe07b9d0109e561ee938fea
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=44e245d583dbab339193d26cc850e94cc798c9f435ecbea504dcced870ccfb58fd0fec31ca6cc34c26f8ae4990f3438a15645f5b4c09d073
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44f37491f6d2cb23e073827dda3a5cf6338c8639c5b780424503ac5bbeab06d7f2138e1ca1b05e33e5689f734e6140531
Unsubscribe

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Update: Senator Schumer says end the commission
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

The big meeting of the sham Trump-Pence election commission is today
in New Hampshire.

Protesters have been gathering at St. Anselm College in Manchester
since before 8:00 a.m. ET, and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer
has urged Democrats to work to end the commission altogether.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dems_2/?t=1002&akid=266%2E356062%2EFzZPL2 ]If you haven’t added your name to our petition yet, can you do it
now? Demand congressional Democrats work to end the sham election
commission right away.

We need to deprive this commission of any sheen of legitimacy.

Thank you for standing up for our democracy today,

Russ Feingold

------Original Message------
From: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
Subject: Senator Schumer says end the commission

Friend,

The sham Trump-Pence election commission is meeting tomorrow in New
Hampshire, and already LegitAction members throughout the country have
stepped up to sign our petition and say:

Congressional Democrats must heed Senator Chuck Schumer’s call to end
this commission whose only intention is to disenfranchise voters.

Many Democrats see the commission for what it is, but many still
don’t, like New Hampshire Secretary of State Bill Gardner. Gardner
continues to serve on the commission and is even hosting tomorrow’s
meeting -- despite the obvious danger we know the commission poses.

We need to deprive this illegitimate commission of its bipartisan
sheen, and that means getting more members of Congress behind ending
it.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dems_2/?t=1003&akid=266%2E356062%2EFzZPL2 ]Add your name to the petition today. Demand congressional Democrats
work to end the sham election commission now.

Tomorrow’s meeting will be only the second time this commission has
convened. It’s still getting started, and there’s still time to nip it
in the bud.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy now,

Russ Feingold

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Stop single-payer health care in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
Did you know that my opponent, Justin Fairfax, supports single-payer health care?
In a survey submitted to the Bernie Sanders-linked group "Our Revolution," Fairfax supported Sanders' single-payer health care proposal. [You can view it here, on page four](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAtrswlfjcJo5r3LxtnUoyaiPTz9wPnO0MY_jfQPEGalFSsn4_Cy7z8IqBLRHPE3BJIBjInYG9PhGLlJzKGqx5iFMpIuMwA-PHTI2aSPIPQeJ5MBFEJkakBCWV_K_6AEFoMCyWeAtTUacCIuNOWoQQJ1QKS4lj0N4slTqISkA72X1KcIdVw6sQ-vbLY7dtfRhHvGJiA2UsBKGlEfaS_QBkdH4aRvJUOgDEVCNrJMFB8=&c=BqIFZxRhdc7e2l3IrS7dX3hebBSkRK1GwjEawnQaJd1SO73Y7j1ang==&ch=7QG46iz713aKlVKR9wuFUeLgAm_p6uEtNsSM8ooSOqxv2NB65maAVg==). Bernie Sanders' single-payer health care proposal will end private insurance, force everyone on a government plan, and lead to a 39% increase in government spending paid for with new taxes. Single-payer takes private insurance away from those who are happy with their health care plans. Hardworking Virginia families should not have to worry about politicians deciding which doctors they can see how they are going to pay for the $1.38 trillion annual price tag of the Sanders plan. While my opponent supports single-payer, I oppose it. I believe that we should pursue market-oriented solutions that allow people more freedom and choice - not limit it with a taxpayer funded government takeover. Whether introduced at the federal or state level, single-payer health care is an expensive experiment that will end private insurance, limit consumer choice, increase wait times, reduce access to specialists, and ration our health care. Virginians face a choice about the future of health care and it could not be more clear.
If single-payer health care is not the future you want, please join me in my fight on behalf of patients with a [contribution of $1000, $500, $100, or even $50](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAtrswlfjcJo5r3LxtnUoyaiPTz9wPnO0MY_jfQPEGalFSsn4_Cy75lshIuC2g6HABB6M6LoNwzClq3aeMjdygKxFpiWTMbvyYJfNd5-UGQ-mw7mem10MFi5OcYimPC2pJ0io8kDM_2Uol_RvseVyEdoXI3ucQtp4srgSnH9I2M=&c=BqIFZxRhdc7e2l3IrS7dX3hebBSkRK1GwjEawnQaJd1SO73Y7j1ang==&ch=7QG46iz713aKlVKR9wuFUeLgAm_p6uEtNsSM8ooSOqxv2NB65maAVg==) to help us get our message out about why single-payer is wrong for Virginia.
If you cannot contribute, [please volunteer and get involved](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAtrswlfjcJo5r3LxtnUoyaiPTz9wPnO0MY_jfQPEGalFSsn4_Cy76LJPEYB9dGLUNB7CDur5ugFJAAZpjtoJUyYm5vkNmr0gd1xWMpuAwClAParoh2pEbbA0nNCaOi3jAs1t7vPys5jUnWDija2Grqh82oBOlWO&c=BqIFZxRhdc7e2l3IrS7dX3hebBSkRK1GwjEawnQaJd1SO73Y7j1ang==&ch=7QG46iz713aKlVKR9wuFUeLgAm_p6uEtNsSM8ooSOqxv2NB65maAVg==), because this November, the policies shaping Virginia's future will be on the ballot, and Virginia cannot afford leadership who believes a total government takeover of health care is preferable or affordable.
Sincerely,
---

| Jill Vogel

subject: If you agree that we need to keep Corey Stewart out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

We wanted to make sure you saw this update from the team about President Trump's decision to betray hundreds of thousands of DREAMers who came to this country as kids.

The fact is, Congress is now our best chance to protect DREAMers through legislation like the DREAM Act. But if Corey Stewart is our Senator, he will make attacks on immigrant families a top priority. **[That's why we need to make sure there are leaders like Tim in Washington who will fight back against an extreme agenda and work to make progress through commonsense solutions.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Bn7uJKb1QsYtmNM0F0LRVSkkGRF7T%2B8n)** Tim's campaign for a second term is gearing up, and he needs your support.

**Chip in $10 or whatever you can today if you agree that we need to keep Corey out of the Senate and reelect Tim:**

**[https://timkaine.com/stop-stewart](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=H2SdDRCf5i2dssOZauXEaikkGRF7T%2B8n)**

Thank you. _\---------- Forwarded message ----------_
From: **Team Kaine**
Subject: President Trump Betrays Young DREAMers

|
---
| **Trump Will End DACA Program

This is a betrayal to young DREAMers who are strengthening Virginia and America. Tell him DREAMers are here to stay:**

**[DEFEND DACA](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=w%2FXlrZU1dUMZVOJbesQQwCkkGRF7T%2B8n)**

Just last week, Tim Kaine met with a group of DREAMers in Alexandria to hear how DACA, or the "Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals" program, has helped them pursue their dreams. America has always been a nation of immigrants -- these DREAMers have made Virginia stronger and our economy more successful.

But now, President Trump is going back on his word and putting hundreds of thousands of young Americans, including more than 12,000 in Virginia, at risk of separation from their families by ending the DACA program as we know it.

This is a heartless decision that betrays these incredible young DREAMers who Trump said he would treat with "great heart."

**[These incredible kids came out of the shadows believing in the promise of America. This nation is their home. Tell President Trump not to send them back.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lfpfKuhRmzIMrzj9fnL1BykkGRF7T%2B8n)**

Thank you for defending DACA.

name: Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (via DSCC.org)
subject: 10 Democratic women Senators who are counting on you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
When I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2015, I knew that it would be a tough fight. But I also knew that the DSCC's Women's Senate Network (WSN) would be with me every step of the way. With 10 female Democratic Senators up for re-election, the Women's Senate Network needs your help, team.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170912-Masto-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

When I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2015, I knew that it would be a tough fight.

As Nevada's Attorney General, I had done some things that made me pretty unpopular with special interest groups. When the Big Banks preyed upon Nevada's middle-class families, I refused to sit back and I led the fight against foreclosure fraud. I fought the Big Banks tooth and nail to get the relief and justice Nevada families deserved -- and I brought back over $1.9 billion to Nevada.

**I knew my work would make me a top target for dark money attacks from GOP super PACs. But I also knew that the DSCC 's Women's Senate Network (WSN) would be with me every step of the way.**

**With ten female Democratic Senators up for re-election next year, we can 't afford to wait. We need to launch strong campaigns now. [So I'm asking team, will you chip in $1 or whatever you can today to become a member of the Women's Senate Network?](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170912-Masto-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Founded in 2001 by my colleague, Senator Debbie Stabenow, WSN's goal is to help more women join -- _and stay_ \-- in the U.S. Senate.

Our mission is to help our candidates launch strong, tough campaigns, provide guidance, mentorship, and financial support -- and ultimately, win.

Since WSN launched, I'm pleased to say that a record number of women have joined the Senate. This election cycle, we have ten Democratic female Senators up for re-election and the chance to elect my friend Jacky Rosen in Nevada. It's an important fight and I am proud to help lead it as the Chair of the 2018 Women's Senate Network.

[**Team, the number of female Democratic Senators up for re-election represents nearly HALF of all women in the Senate. Will you chip in $1 or whatever you can today to help the Women 's Senate Network get the job done?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170912-Masto-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

It was the hard work of Senators Claire McCaskill and Kirsten Gillibrand that pushed the Senate to hold hearings and demand accountability on sexual assault in the military. It was Elizabeth Warren who helped make the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau become a safeguard for consumers everywhere. And it is our female Senators who have led the fight to defend Planned Parenthood.

**I don 't want to imagine what the Senate will look like in 2019 if we don't help all of our female candidates win. And the reality is that means we have to start now, not next year.**

Some of our female Senators are already facing attack ads in their home states and it's going to take a grassroots movement to get all of our women re-elected.

**Team, help provide our Democratic women candidates with the resources they need for the fights ahead -- chip in today:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/elect-women**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170912-Masto-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for your support,

_¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
Chair, Women's Senate Network

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d8f3/2b07114c/19a49b16/7314924d/1819276170/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d8f3/2b07114c/19a49b16/7314924c/1819276170/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d8f3/2b07114c/19a49b16/7314924f/1819276170/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
